payload.label: dresser
payload.long_description: Dark brown varnished wooden dresser with several horizontal drawers and dark metal handles in a traditional rectangular form; the front is partially occluded by the bed at the left and the crop cuts the object slightly at the edge — approximately 1.2 m from the camera.
